ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the data (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_windows" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time window */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the time window belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time window */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time window */,
  "window_type" TEXT /* Type of time window (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "window_size" INTEGER /* Size of the time window */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_windows_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the model is trained on */,
  "window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time window the model is trained on */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for model training */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for model training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "cross_entropy" REAL /* Cross-entropy value of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_size" INTEGER /* Size of the model in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("window_id") REFERENCES time_windows ("window_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "cross_entropy" REAL /* Cross-entropy value of the model on this date */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on this date */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on this date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
